3310560.name: A Safe Place
3310560.description:
(NOTICE: The story for this demo has been retconned, the demo will still be up but keep in mind that everything you see is NOT canon to the upcoming full release of Chapter One)

A thick purple liquid is caving in his mind, warning him of something that craves his flesh. As you play as a young yet interesting pink haired boy, you go through this small yet humble town R̶̝̯̠̙̜̱̓͛͠É̸̗͆͋̂́͊̕À̵̡͖͎̦̬̤̱̈́̉̉Ĺ̸͓̒̎͊M̵̩̦̺̘͘͠ ̶̨̢̞͖̙̾͛͒̀̈́́T̷̢̪͙̺̻̦̏̾͒͝H̷̛̼̦̗͊̎͒́Å̷̖͎̻̗̞̣͔̃̈́T̴̩̠̬̤̠̊̀̽͐͝ ̸̡̮̩̥̻̀͐̾̓͘I̸̡̥͈̝̪̠̹͛̅̄͑̉ ̶̗͂͘͜M̴̧̻͙̟̩̟̤̀͑̓̇̽Ą̴̬̣̫̜̉͋̂̀͝Ḑ̸̫̫̱̜̭͇́̾̕Ę̴̢̦̥̪̠̤̎̄͛͗́̚͝ ̵̨̧̮͎̼̦͕̇J̸̛͎͌̅̔́̚Ư̷̠̹̄̇S̸̟̫̔T̸̡̽͒̅ ̶̠̫̑F̸̳͓̤̝̄̂̓̀̀͂Ǫ̶͕̰͙̫̬̓̿̉̎ͅR̴̪̭̋̂̅ ̴̢̱͕̼̕͘Ÿ̷͔͔Ǫ̸̺̓͑͋̚Ų̵̟̙̜͈̭̈̓͜ ̸͚͍͐́̀̏̚̕S̸̺͖̑͂H̴͖͎̭̰̯̙̆̄̍̊͝͝͝Ẻ̴͖͖̣̤̝̀͑̿̐̔̒͜L̴̡̲͒̈̐̓͘D̸̢̫̦̾̂̉̏͝O̷͍̱͕͔̒̉̎̌͋N̶̛̥͍̭̻̪͎̞͑̌̀͊

In this short early access build, our small, pink-haired main character Sheldon, ventures through the town on his way to school, only to pass out and enter the catacombs of his mind However, our pink-haired friend experiences an interesting dream, that shortly becomes a nightmare, warning him of something that may be a bigger threat.

Fight off the bullies that stop you from receiving your well deserved education by using time-based combat, eat food to heal you and your fellow buddies and save them from doom! F̷̱̾̃̎į̸̝̘̻͒͊n̵̨͔̤̗͗͘͝͠ḑ̷̛̟̟̰̒̎̈́ ̴͖͕̆̄̌͛t̵̖̰̹͐ḩ̴̺̹̞͌̽̾͝e̵͙̩͌̅̃ ̸̘̾̈r̸͎̔͆̉͗o̵̪͕͖͆̓ͅt̶͕̘͊t̴̘͌̿͐͠ē̴̲̫̱͜͠n̸̢͋͜ ̵̭͇͕͚̂̀r̷̼̲̾̾ḛ̸̉̀̋m̵͈̼͌͂̉̓ͅǎ̷̭ĭ̶̦͆ṅ̸̙̰͇̀̃͒s̷̺͇͔͑͘ ̸̝̻̯͕̃̇̈́̃ǫ̶̖̋͝f̶͖͋̌̽̏ ̶̡̙̮̊t̷̺̤̼̯̀h̵͔̳͔̪͂͋̐͝o̵̢̘̠̐̋̿s̶̮̲̽̂͗͠e̴̮̾ͅ ̵̦̱͍͐̕w̷̧͎͈̭̿h̵͍͉̒̉̈́͠ọ̴͒̌̀ ̴̡̺̖̥͌̀͗ď̵͕̜̟̅͜a̴͇̎̔r̶͉̙̣͙̂̽̉ĕ̷̖̱̋͊̓ḏ̷̢͊̉̐ͅ ̴̧͚̬̋͘ͅt̵͇̆̃̋o̵̡͆̾͆ ̷̱̽f̷̦͎̐̈́ì̶̧̜͎͋͝ğ̵͇͖̭̟́̓h̵͉̟̎ṭ̸̀̈́́ ̴̺̤͙͘m̴͖͇̈́e̷͈̎̕̚ ̴̺̗͊̿͝?? Find secrets of t̶̰̲̬̎̈́͝h̸͍̿̇e̴͖̋͛ ̷̼̺̻̲̽̈̐͘p̵͙͆̊̊̌ủ̶̟̀r̸̬̳̜͘p̵̪̐͜͝l̸̙̙͉̥̄e̸̗̙͎̞̾͗̉ ̸̨̨͉̬͐̄̐w̶̤̩̃͆a̷̻͓̅̂̉̾t̷̗̜͔̎̀͐e̶̜͔̊̾r̷̥̪̻̃͒̔ͅ to make the world A Safe Place! (See what I did there?)

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

CONTENT WARNING FOR THE FULL RELEASE:

The full release build of my game (as of right now) is a bit mature, so I'd like to leave a content warning for anyone just in case!

  • Mild Swearing (Words like "shit", "ass" and one use of the word "fuck")

  • Pixelated body horror

  • Mutilated corpses hanging from hooks or pinned to walls with nails

  • Enemies you encounter can make VERY loud screeches

  • Â̸̹ͅB̸͔͇̺͈̏̅S̶̨̘̣͍͝Ọ̴̜͓̩͌̈́̊L̵̛̹̗̭͜U̵̞͆Ţ̶̻͕̜̄͘Ě̶̳͌L̸̛͙̦̑̆Y̵͙͒͊͊͌ ̴̥͉̈́Ṉ̸̛͓͓̟̐̌͒̇O̷̼͎̲̬̔̆̔T̴̖̠̙̹̍̌Ḩ̶͇͋̽I̶͙̔N̷̘̟̑̄̂̎͝G̶͕̈́̽ ̵̢̐̆́Ẁ̴̝́̂R̴͓̈́̍͝Ǫ̵̧̮͋N̴̮̬̩̺̥͌̂G̷͉̑̓̇͝ ̷̭̦̉̊̃́̚Y̸̘̮͆͘̚O̷͕͚̗̗̓̂͂U̷̺͉͚̍̂R̷͎̖̖͕̼̍̓̀ ̵͈̹̼̞̬͐͊͒̊B̷̲̓͛̀͒̔E̴͎͚̠̮͑͝S̸̱̞̩̣͚̓͘T̶̮̝̠̒̾̒͘͠ ̵̺̺͉̒̆B̷̩̦̒͌͆͊͂U̵̻̅̄D̴̤̬̾̊͝͝D̸͉̥̊̾Y̸̜͎͎̿͜ ̵̼͑W̷͈͠Ỉ̶̳L̴̨̲̳̀L̸͖̫̥̤̬̀́͋͊ ̴̣̠̪̯͐̒̍͂̈́͜A̷̛͙͎̝͓̅̔̄̿L̴̮̫̺͎͚̿Ẉ̶̘̺̕ͅẢ̵̮̦̀͋͝Y̵̯͙͚͎̾̆̓S̷̠̒̅̃ ̸̮̪̘͋͜H̵̭̬̩̐̾Ḙ̶͈̗̀́̽́͘Ĺ̷̡͖́̈P̸̮̖̻̯̣̈́̊ ̴̮̈͛̍͊Ý̸̨̮̄O̴̧̝̗̯͈͒̑U̸̘̦̇͛͜͠ͅ,̷̩̻̓̈̿̋͗ ̴̨̟̱͒̿̅̓͝Y̸̨̑̉͗͗O̵͍͕̮͒̉Ü̶̥͑͂͆ ̸̮͙̺̬͛J̴͖̎̌̈͛Ů̵̫̤̲͂̈́͜S̵̨͈̩̫͆̃͜͝Ţ̸̡̣̯̐̑̒͊̚ ̶̹͍͚̗̎N̸̲͑̍̇͝͠E̸̖̙̗͇͂E̵̩͚͑͝Ḑ̶̤̮̀̚̕ ̶̩̦̋T̵̻̐̋̍̔O̴̢͛̿ ̴̜͎̀̐̀͠͠Ḍ̵̢̧͠R̷͔͇͓̻͐̽I̶͈͓̍̓N̵̞̪͉̏̈̂͐͋K̷̹̫̠̪͙̈́̑͗͘ ̷̰̣͓̂̈́͒̈́T̸̞̗̲̫̅͑H̴̞̉̓Ị̵̛͔̖̋S̶̲̹̗̊̓̓͗ ̵̥̣̈́̐̓̾̈ͅP̸̗͑U̴̙̾͆R̷̡͍̠̦̭̔P̸̩̘̝͍̋͗̄L̶͕̮̰̤̯̔̋̚Ĕ̴͔ ̶͇̲̰͍̀̋͗̋F̵̧̻͚̃̈̎̚Ľ̷̥̦̜͇Ủ̸͙Ĭ̵͉͚̥̝̀́̎͝Ḑ̸̡̖̳̾̈̔͛ ̸̢̼͖̃͗͆̋͜Ṫ̴̻̓͌̚Ř̴͔̑́́Ǘ̴̢̨̪̩̯̄̂S̶̪̟̘̪̀̓̕T̷̗̞͎̍́͜͝ͅ ̷̨̘͐̾̏ͅM̶̗͋̊̒̆͠Ȩ̴̛͖̮̏̉ͅ ̷̯̝̣̈́̓͘İ̶̼̙̙̠͔̀T̶͍̊̾͛͝ ̶͎̻̽͛̾͠W̷͙͖͌̎̚̚Î̸͇̀L̴͕͍̳̚L̷͚̝̈́̉̎́̑ ̸̢̫͇̥͌̈͆̾H̶͚̪̗̦͜͝E̶̠̓͜Ḁ̸̆L̵̛̙̝̟̲̒ ̸͙̗̂́̌́̓Y̵͎̍̈́Ơ̵̤̗͚̩U̸̞̦̣̘͖̒̐ ̸̬̫̎̂I̸̗̠̟̊̉͝T̶̯̽͗̾̓̉ ̶͎͉̮͒͝W̶̼͕͗̑͑İ̴͚̙͈̃̋͑ͅĽ̶̻͎̻̙̀͗L̷̞͓̹̼̎̾̓̂͜ ̵̡̢̱̃F̷̣̖̳̼̆̆̏ͅI̵̞̙̹͝Ẋ̴̪͉̤͙̽ ̵̞̍̂͐Y̴̧͙̦͆̈ͅO̷̩͓̓̌̋͋U̴̲̎͝ ̶̯͖͕́̀͌́Ņ̶̧͇͓̏O̵̼͔̯͋͛̏ ̵̨̫̹̍M̷̢̡̠̯̅̌̀O̵̳̔͗̄R̸̢̙̠͈͗̑̔̒͘E̶̮̱̲̐̏̋͋ ̵͙̍̂͊̃͘P̷͕̻̏̽̑͛A̴̪͝I̸̬̘̫͈̾̃͊Ṇ̴̯̰͓̙̎͊ ̴̥͔̙̾͐̆W̴̯̗̥̟̾̀͌I̵͔͒̏L̶̘̹̈L̸͚̪͈̔̎͛ ̸̼̀́͘C̵͚̫̋̋O̴̧̨͈̳̭̿͋̕̚͝M̸̼̺̎̌Ẻ̴̗̬̉ ̴̞͖̰̪͓̆̍̅̕̚T̷̰̘̭̈́̀̓̓̚O̴͔̍͛̿͘ ̷̦̻͕̃Ỳ̵̨̰͇͎͓̉͊͠O̶̡̯̟͕̺͠U̶̩̥̘̹͌̋ ̴͇͓͚̺́Ỉ̵̘̪̺͌̆͠ ̵̤̭̳̃̕Ṕ̵̰̹͛̕R̴̛̯̩̔͆͐͠Ṓ̸͓͑ͅM̴̨̬̽͗̍̍͜͝Ĭ̶̟̻͗́͠S̸̨̛̼̠̙̀̊͑ͅĚ̵͓̤͖̞̾̽̓͗ ̴̠͔̖͓̞͘J̵̗͚̦̠́̌U̶̧̬̗̘͝Ṣ̸̯̜̦̺̂́̀̓T̴̢̛̊̇͂̂ ̴̲͛ͅD̵̛͉̻̯̤͚̈̆̃Ṝ̵̡͖͖̝̾̂I̸̛̖͚̖̿̐̍N̸͔͐̏͜K̶̡̙̭̗̮͘͠ ̶̡̢̛̟̊̿̉T̵̛̜̣̲Ḩ̸̛̞͙͈̏Ę̴̯̫̣̈́̐͋͝ ̷͉̥͌̀̑́P̶̥͉̺̔U̷̬̾͐̈́Ṛ̵͙̭́̒̂̈́P̶͍͙̲̺͗͌Ľ̵̝̯̚̚͠E̶͔̔̌̾̐͠ ̷̧͝F̷̲̥̫̎̀͑L̴͕̺̾U̴̼̗̹̿̿I̸͉̭̞̊D̶̤͖̊̈́̂͐

  • Worst of all, no 𝓔𝓰𝓰 0_0

This game will be available for:

Windows 7,  Windows 8, Windows 8.1, Windows 10 and Windows 11

(To be honest, a damn potato could run this game)
